channel.title: Frontion - Geopolitical News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israel orders evacuations of 11 towns in southern Lebanon amid Hezbollah operations
item.description: The Israeli military issued urgent evacuation warnings to residents of 11 towns and villages in southern Lebanon, telling them to move at least 1,000 meters away. The order comes as Israel continues operations against Hezbollah.

item.title: 🛢️ OPEC+ agrees to boost oil production as Iran blocks Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Seven OPEC+ countries including Saudi Arabia and Russia agreed to increase production by 188,000 barrels per day starting in June. The move is largely symbolic as the Strait of Hormuz remains blocked, preventing Gulf oil exports.

item.title: 🛢️ OPEC+ set for third oil output hike since Hormuz closure, sources say
item.description: OPEC+ is expected to agree to another increase in oil production quotas, the third since Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz. However, the increase will remain largely on paper as long as Gulf oil supplies remain disrupted.

item.title: 🇻🇦 Rubio to visit Vatican and Rome after Trump clashes with Pope and Italian leadership
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio will travel to Rome and the Vatican this week, following tensions between President Trump and Pope Leo, as well as disputes with Italian leadership over US foreign policy.

item.title: 🇺🇸 CBS News: Trump reviewing Iran peace proposal as congressional deadline passes
item.description: President Trump is reviewing a new 14-point peace proposal from Iran aimed at ending the conflict. The deadline for congressional authorization under the War Powers Resolution has passed, raising questions about the legal basis for continued US involvement.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Nobel Laureate Narges Mohammadi in Critical Condition in Iranian Hospital
item.description: Jailed Nobel Peace Prize laureate Narges Mohammadi remains in critical condition in a cardiac care unit in northwestern Iran after being transferred from prison. Her family foundation reports her health is deteriorating due to her continued imprisonment.

item.title: 🇬🇧 Four Injured in South London Shooting
item.description: Four people were hospitalized with gunshot wounds in a shooting in south London. Police are investigating whether the incident is related to a stabbing that occurred the same day.

item.title: 🇪🇺 ECB Policymaker Warns Euro Zone Recession Fears Are Real
item.description: Bank of Greece governor Yannis Stournaras warned that euro zone recession concerns are "real and justified" as Middle East conflict continues. He emphasized that talks to end the Iran war will be critical for ECB monetary policy decisions.

item.title: 🌏 Asian Development Bank Launches Critical Minerals Finance Scheme
item.description: The ADB launched a new financing initiative to help Asia-Pacific countries develop supply chains for critical minerals used in clean energy, batteries, and electric vehicles. The move addresses growing demand for strategic resources.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Pays Steep Price in Battle to Reverse Fortunes
item.description: Israel has displaced hundreds of thousands of Hezbollah constituents and killed as many as several thousand of its fighters. Domestic rivals are hardening opposition against Hezbollah status as an armed group.

item.title: 🇯🇵 SoftBank to develop lithium-free batteries for Japanese data centers
item.description: Japan's SoftBank Group plans to manufacture batteries without expensive lithium and cobalt, aiming to power the country's growing data center infrastructure while reducing dependence on critical minerals.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US congressional Republicans question prosecution of former FBI Director Comey
item.description: Republican Senator Thom Tillis expressed reservations about the prosecution of former FBI Director James Comey, signaling potential intra-party tensions over the Justice Department's approach.

item.title: 🇸🇪 Sweden seizes Russian shadow fleet tanker in Baltic Sea
item.description: The Swedish Coast Guard seized a tanker believed to be part of Russia's shadow fleet operating in the Baltic Sea, the latest in a series of similar actions targeting vessels circumventing sanctions.

item.title: 💨 Trump administration halts US wind farm projects over national security
item.description: President Donald Trump's administration has brought US onshore wind development to a halt, citing national security concerns, according to a Financial Times report.

item.title: 🇵🇪 Peru electoral board orders comprehensive audit of election results
item.description: Peru's National Jury of Elections requested a thorough IT audit of the April 12 general election results, raising concerns about the integrity of the electoral process.

item.title: 🚢 Israel extends detention of Gaza flotilla activists
item.description: An Israeli court extended by two days the detention of two activists arrested aboard a Gaza-bound flotilla that was intercepted by Israeli forces in international waters near Greece.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Drones Strike Russian Baltic Port of Primorsk
item.description: Ukraine launched drone attacks hitting the Baltic Sea port of Primorsk, setting it on fire and striking vessels. The attack targets Russian energy infrastructure as Ukraine escalates strikes deep inside Russian territory.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Proposes 30-Day Deadline to End War With US and Israel
item.description: Iran has presented a proposal seeking a comprehensive resolution within 30 days rather than extending the ceasefire. Trump expressed skepticism about the offer while saying he would review it.

item.title: 🇵🇸 Israeli Raid in West Bank Kills One Palestinian
item.description: A Palestinian man was killed and four others wounded during an Israeli military raid in Nablus. The incident adds to escalating violence in the occupied West Bank.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Tests New Skyhammer Interceptor Missiles in Jordan
item.description: The United Kingdom successfully tested a new British-built interceptor missile system designed to counter Iranian Shahed drones. The Skyhammer system has a 30km range and can reach speeds of 700 km/h, strengthening protection for UK forces and Gulf partners.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Poland's Tusk Warns NATO is Disintegrating After US Troop Withdrawal
item.description: Polish Prime Minister Donald Tusk declared NATO is disintegrating following the US announcement to withdraw 5,000 troops from Germany. He warned the greatest threat to the transatlantic community is not external enemies but the ongoing disintegration of the alliance.

item.title: 🇵🇭 China-Philippines Trade Accusations Over South China Sea Landings
item.description: China accused Philippine troops of illegally landing on a disputed sandbar in the Spratly Islands, while Manila vowed to dispatch ships to drive off Chinese vessels conducting what it called illegal research. The tensions come during joint US-Philippines military drills.

item.title: 🚢 Two Women Die in Channel Crossing Attempt Off French Coast
item.description: Two women died after a boat carrying about 80 migrants capsized near Calais while attempting to cross the English Channel to Britain. The victims were believed to be Sudanese women in their 20s.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇵🇭 China and Philippines Trade Accusations Over Disputed South China Sea Reef
item.description: China accused the Philippines of landing personnel on a disputed reef while Manila said it would dispatch ships to drive off Chinese vessels conducting illegal research. The latest escalation in territorial tensions comes amid ongoing disputes in the strategic waterway.

item.title: 🇮🇱✈️ Israel Approves Multi-Billion Dollar Fighter Jet Purchase from US
item.description: Israel gave final approval to purchase two new combat squadrons of F-35 and F-15IA advanced fighter aircraft from Lockheed Martin and Boeing. The deal, worth tens of billions of dollars, significantly strengthens Israeli air power amid regional tensions.
